intro.p1_before: We are an engineering company specialised in the
intro.p1_middle: of high-reliability electronic and optoelectronic systems. Since 2006, our track record has been defined by involvement in critical programmes in the
intro.p2_before: We cover the complete system lifecycle: from functional definition through to final validation. We operate under safety standards
intro.p2_after: guaranteeing technical excellence backed by our certifications

vision.label: Our
vision.title: Vision
vision.p1: To become an international benchmark in advanced engineering for critical systems, delivering technological solutions that drive progress across the aerospace, defence and industrial sectors.
vision.p2: We develop reliable, precise and sustainable technology, built to operate in the most demanding environments, where safety, performance and quality admit no compromise. We believe in an engineering discipline that not only solves technical challenges, but builds long-term trust.

mision.label: Our
mision.title: Mission
mision.p1: To design, develop and validate tailored technological solutions, supporting our clients throughout the entire project lifecycle, from the conceptual phase through to final delivery.
mision.p2: We work under rigorous international standards, applying technical discipline, continuous innovation and a culture of excellence to ensure every system fulfils its mission robustly, safely and efficiently. At Quandum, we treat every project as unique and take full responsibility for turning complex requirements into reliable, certifiable solutions.

press.title: in specialized media
press.label: External Recognition
press.description: Our activity and industrial growth have been recognized by institutional and specialized sector media, reinforcing our technological and productive positioning.
press.label2: IDEA MAGAZINE · IDEA AGENCY · REGIONAL GOVERNMENT OF ANDALUSIA
press.title2: Quandum Aerospace increases its production capacity for aeronautical components
press.description2: The report highlights the expansion of our facilities and the incorporation of new industrial machinery, within the framework of a public grant aimed at strengthening the Andalusian aerospace industrial sector.
press.footer: External source · Institutional publication · Editorial content

filosofia.label: Our
filosofia.title: Philosophy
filosofia.p1: We approach every project with a unique combination of technical rigour, continuous innovation and critical thinking. Our developments are guided by international standards — DO-178C, DO-254, DO-160, MIL-STD — ensuring that every system we design meets the most demanding levels of safety and performance.

trayectoria.label: Our
trayectoria.title: Track Record
trayectoria.intro: Over two decades we have taken part in strategic programmes for defence, aeronautics and high-demand industrial sectors, always upholding a culture of:

herovideo.title: About Quandum
herovideo.description: We have been manufacturing engineering solutions for the aerospace sector since 2006.

titleHitos.subtitle: A journey of precision, innovation and vision that continues to rise.

items.title: Foundation
items.detail: The company's beginnings and its first contracts with Airbus Military.

items.title: Certifications
items.detail: Implementation of management systems and achievement of certifications under aeronautical and industrial sector standards (EN 9100 / ISO 9001).

items.title: Consolidation
items.detail: Development of product lines in electronics and optoelectronics for airborne platforms.

items.title: Technological expansion
items.detail: Integration of rapid prototyping systems and precision manufacturing processes.

items.title: Strategic projects
items.detail: Participation in defence programmes and integrated vision/IR systems.

items.title: Operational maturity
items.detail: Consolidated team and processes oriented towards certification and international supply.

herofacilities.title: The operating core
herofacilities.description: Safe environments and laboratories where engineering reaches its highest level.

facilities.description: 4,000 m² of specialised infrastructure for the development, manufacturing and validation of aerospace systems under international regulations.

images.label: Technical Team
images.specs: Behind every solution stands a multidisciplinary team combining knowledge, innovation and technical precision.

images.label: Turning Centre
images.specs: High-precision machining for critical rotating components.

images.label: DMG MORI CLX 550
images.specs: State-of-the-art technology for high-performance universal turning.

images.label: CNC Milling
images.specs: Multi-axis capability for complex aerospace geometries.

images.label: 3D Printing
images.specs: Large-volume industrial additive manufacturing for structural prototyping and tooling.

images.label: Specialised Welding
images.specs: Certified joining processes for high-strength structures.

images.label: Fibre Laser Cutting
images.specs: Precision technology for metal cutting with high speed, clean edges and minimal thermal distortion.

facilitiespage.subtitle1: For the assembly of sensitive optical components
facilitiespage.description1: A 100 m² technical space designed for the assembly of delicate optical systems. It features constant air filtration and temperature regulation systems, providing the stable conditions required to operate with highly sensitive equipment.
facilitiespage.description2: A specialized area dedicated to the final integration of complex systems. Equipped with state-of-the-art metrology and calibration tools, we ensure precise alignment and functionality prior to delivery. This is the critical stage where component precision is transformed into the optimal performance of the finished system.
facilitiespage.description3: Our 600 m² R&D Laboratory is the driving force behind the next generation of systems. Focused on applied research and the exploration of new technological frontiers, we provide a comprehensive platform ranging from conceptual validation and rapid prototyping to the execution of rigorous technical certifications. This environment accelerates the transition from concept to validated product, ensuring the successful introduction of disruptive solutions to the market.
